title: Water Ingress Repair (Battery/MCU)
description: Procedure for diagnosing and repairing water ingress (yellow/orange residue), including Battery and MCU replacement.

steps.title: Open Deck Cover
steps.desc: Remove six hex bolts on deck. Then remove the four Phillips-head screws on the underside of the scooter deck.

steps.title: Remove Deck Plate
steps.desc: Slide out the deck cover carefully.

steps.title: Disconnect System
steps.desc: Unplug all connectors visible in the battery compartment.

steps.title: Unmount Battery
steps.desc: Remove the two battery mounting brackets using Hex 3.

steps.title: Release Chassis Points
steps.desc: Remove two hex chassis bolts from the back of the battery box.

steps.title: Remove Components
steps.desc: Lift the battery carefully and remove the controller (MCU). Check for yellow/orange residue indicating water damage.

steps.title: Remove Charging Port
steps.desc: Unscrew two charger port Phillips screws from the right side of the box.

steps.title: Clean Battery Box
steps.desc: Clean the inside of the chassis thoroughly using degreaser and blue roll tissue.
steps.warning: Wear gloves to avoid contact with residue.

steps.title: Dry Chassis
steps.desc: Wipe everything down with a dry cloth to ensure no moisture remains.

steps.title: Install New Components
steps.desc: Replace with new Battery, MCU, and Charging port. Secure them in place.

steps.title: Reconnect System
steps.desc: Plug in all connectors. Ensure solid clicks on all plugs.
steps.tip: Cable Routing: Biggest hole = Power cable. Beside biggest = Rear light. Buttonhole = Digital display cable.

steps.title: Close Deck
steps.desc: Reinstall the deck cover and tighten screws evenly. Do not forget underside four screws and long metal plate.
steps.warning: Seal Check: Ensure the skirt (seal) between deck and battery box is correctly placed at the four screw points.
